headline: The Dealmaking 3: NBA Playoffs on NBC, NFL Draft AI & $7M for Athletes
summary: Watch The Dealmaking 3 of the Week: This week of The Dealmaking 3 with “The Sports Professor” Rick Horrow features the Challenged Athletes Foundation distributing more than 4,000 grants around the world totalling $7 million, NBC Sports rejoining the NBA playoffs in a deal running 11 years and the early impacts of this partnership, and NFL […] The post The Dealmaking 3: NBA Playoffs on NBC, NFL Draft AI & $7M for Athletes appeared first on CorpGov.
